# Highly Visual

> Highly Visual is Barny Trevelyan-Johnson's Nairobi-based natural-history and aerial cinematography practice — drone operator and cinematographer for BBC NHU, Silverback Films, Plimsoll Productions, Offspring Films, and Nat Geo / Disney+; documentary photography consultant on Silk Road Visual's MSG-Sphere-spec Canniverse fulldome project with the Kenya Tourism Board. CAA-licensed since 2017 (PfCO UAS 9543), KFCB-registered, 14+ countries.

## What I do

- Drone and long-lens cinematography for natural-history broadcast (BBC NHU stack, Nat Geo / Disney+ / Netflix)
- Film fixing — local production services across Kenya and East Africa
- Commercial and brand video production — end-to-end solo

## Credentials

- UK CAA PfCO (Permission for Commercial Operations) UAS 9543, issued 2017
- KFCB (Kenya Film Classification Board) registered local film agent
- 14+ countries of professional fieldwork, including extreme environments
- Active licences in both Kenya and the UK

## Productions

Drone operator and aerial cinematographer on natural-history productions including: A Life on Our Planet (Silverback / Netflix, 2020 — Emmy-winning cinematography); Our Great National Parks (Higher Ground / Netflix, 2022 — Critics Choice-winning cinematography); Incredible Animal Journeys (National Geographic / Disney+, 2023 — Emmy-nominated); Secrets of the Elephants (National Geographic / Disney+, 2023); Dynasties II (BBC NHU, 2022); Seven Worlds One Planet (BBC NHU, 2019); The Green Planet (BBC NHU, 2022); A Perfect Planet (BBC NHU, 2021); Planet Earth III (BBC NHU, 2023); Our Planet II (Silverback / Netflix, 2023 — Emmy-nominated, Jackson Wild-winning); Tiny World (Plimsoll / Apple TV+, 2020); Our Changing Planet (BBC, 2022); Wild Babies (Plimsoll / Netflix, 2022 — Daytime Emmy-winning); Queens (Wildstar Films / Disney+, 2024); Secret World of Sound (Humble Bee / Sky / BBC Earth, 2024); Earth at Night in Color (Offspring / Apple TV+, 2020); Earth from Space (BBC NHU, 2019); Equator from the Air (BBC); Ecosphere (Silverback / XM2 / Apple TV+, 2023); Africa from Above (Off the Fence); Breaking Boundaries (Silverback / Netflix, 2021); Legacy (Yann Arthus-Bertrand, theatrical); The Story of Us (Asylum Entertainment / National Geographic, with Morgan Freeman); Prodigies (Apple TV+); plus drone work on Endangered Species (Lionsgate, 2021), Poacher (Plan B / Amazon Prime Video, 2024), Rendez-vous en terre inconnue (France 2 / France TV, Kenya unit), Seat at the Table (YouTube Originals), and brand-film production for Cheli & Peacock Safaris and Kasas Air Charter.

Documentary photography consultant on Silk Road Visual's "Canniverse" fulldome project (joint with the Kenya Tourism Board), benchmarked against the internal Las Vegas MSG Sphere dome-screen spec.

## Awards

- 2021 Primetime Creative Arts Emmy — Outstanding Cinematography for a Non-Fiction Programme (A Life on Our Planet, Silverback / Netflix). Honoured by the Television Academy for additional cinematography contribution.
- 2022 Critics Choice Documentary Award — Best Cinematography, docuseries (Our Great National Parks, Higher Ground / Netflix). Drone-operator contribution.
- 2023 Daytime Emmy — Outstanding Travel, Adventure and Nature Program (Wild Babies, Plimsoll / Netflix). Drone-operator on the Kenya elephant sequence.
- 2023 Jackson Wild Media Award — Animal Behaviour Long Form (Our Planet 2, Silverback / Netflix). Drone-operator.
- 2024 Primetime Emmy nomination — Outstanding Cinematography for a Non-Fiction Programme (Our Planet 2).
- 2024 News & Documentary Emmy — four nominations including Outstanding Nature Documentary (Incredible Animal Journeys, Plimsoll / Nat Geo / Disney+).

## Sister businesses

- Equipment hire: [hirevisual.com](https://hirevisual.com) — cinema-grade rental catalogue (DJI Inspire 3, Sony FX6/FX3, RED accessories, full lighting and audio kits)
- Stock footage: [stock.highlyvisual.com](https://stock.highlyvisual.com) — 4K+ broadcast stock archive with discounted rates for African productions, students, and NGOs
